appliedRows.title: Chris Olah: The 100 Most Influential People in AI 2024 - TIME
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Chris Olah Correspondent Until very recently, it was a truism that nobody really understood the inner workings of neural networks... That is miraculous, but it also poses challenges for safety. Selection reason: 权威媒体人物简介，明确提及Chris Olah在Anthropic的工作及AI安全贡献，可直接证明其身份与观点。 Source preview: Chris Olah Correspondent Until very recently, it was a truism that nobody really understood the inner workings of neural networks. Sure, scientists could tell you that the algorithms learn to spot patterns in massive amounts of data. But look inside a neural network trained to recognize cats, say, and all you’d see would be lots of very complicated numbers being multiplied together. There is no section of code–at least, not in any language humans can understand–for distinguishing a whisker from a tail. And yet somehow, with enough data and computing power, AI can do just that. That is miraculous, but it also poses challenges for safety. If you don’t know how a very powerful new system works... MiMo rationale: 原来源GPT-4技术报告无法直接证明Chris Olah的个人贡献。候选中的TIME人物简介和Anthropic官方新闻页均能权威、直接地证明其身份、职位及在AI安全/伦理领域的观点，适合作为替换来源。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Chris Olah directly. | Source must support why "https://cdn.openai.com/papers/gpt-4.pdf" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Christopher Manning, Stanford NLP
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Christopher Manning Thomas M. Siebel Professor in Machine Learning, Professor of Linguistics and of Computer Science Senior Fellow, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI) Stanford NLP Group, Stanford AI Lab, HAI, RegLab, Linguistics and Computer Science, Stanford University Selection reason: 这是Christopher Manning在斯坦福NLP组的官方主页，包含其职位、研究方向和最新动态，是权威的个人资料来源。 Source preview: Christopher Manning Thomas M. Siebel Professor in Machine Learning, Professor of Linguistics and of Computer Science Senior Fellow, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI) Stanford NLP Group, Stanford AI Lab, HAI, RegLab, Linguistics and Computer Science, Stanford University What's New? Bio Christopher Manning is the inaugural Thomas M. Siebel Professor in Machine Learning in the Departments of Linguistics and Computer Science at Stanford University and a co-founder and Senior Fellow of the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence (HAI). From 2010, Manning pioneered Natural Language Understanding and Inference using Neural Networks/Deep Learn... appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Christopher Manning: Papers and publications Papers from 2007 on: I haven't been good at keeping this page up to date, and only a few papers have been added here. Papers up till 2006: almost every paper of mine up till 2006 is available here, usually as a PDF file. appliedRows.title: AlphaFold reveals the structure of the protein universe — Google DeepMind
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: AlphaFold reveals the structure of the protein universe Demis Hassabis It’s been one year since we released and open sourced AlphaFold... Selection reason: 官方博客，作者为Demis Hassabis，直接阐述AlphaFold揭示蛋白质宇宙结构的工作，是原始来源的权威替代。 Source preview: Google DeepMind DeepMind Build with Gemini Try Gemini July 28, 2022 Science AlphaFold reveals the structure of the protein universe Demis Hassabis It’s been one year since we released and open sourced AlphaFold, our AI system to predict the 3D structure of a protein just from its 1D amino acid sequence, and created the AlphaFold Protein Structure Database (AlphaFold DB) to freely share this scientific knowledge with the world. Proteins are the building blocks of life, they underpin every biological process in every living thing. And, because a protein’s shape is closely linked with its function, knowing a protein’s structure unlocks a greater understanding of what it does and how it works. ... MiMo rationale: 原始来源被拒是因为内容聚焦技术而非人物。候选中的官方博客（deepmind.google/blog/alphafold-reveals-the-structure-of-the-protein-universe）由Hassabis本人撰写，直接阐述了AlphaFold揭示蛋白质宇宙结构的工作，完美匹配声明，是权威且可访问的替代来源。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Demis Hassabis directly. | Source must support why "AlphaFold reveals the structure of the protein universe" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Stability AI Announcement — Stability AI
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Earlier today, Emad Mostaque resigned from his role as CEO of Stability AI and from his position on the Board of Directors of the company to pursue decentralized AI. Selection reason: 官方公告，明确提及Emad Mostaque辞去CEO职务，证明其领导角色。 Source preview: Stability AI Stability AI Stability AI Stability AI Stability AI Announcement Earlier today, Emad Mostaque resigned from his role as CEO of Stability AI and from his position on the Board of Directors of the company to pursue decentralized AI. The Board of Directors has appointed Shan Shan Wong, our Chief Operating Officer, and Christian Laforte, our Chief Technology Officer, as the interim co-CEOs of Stability AI. We are actively conducting a search for a permanent CEO to build upon Stability AI’s foundation and lead the company into its next phase of growth. “On behalf of the Board of Directors, I want to thank Emad for his leadership and relentless commitment to Stability AI and the open... MiMo rationale: 原始来源未聚焦Emad Mostaque本人，但候选中有官方公告和权威媒体报道可补强其领导角色。Forbes文章虽涉及争议，但直接关联其职位；官方公告明确其辞职信息。两者结合可增强证据链。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Emad Mostaque directly. | Source must support why "Expanding Our Leadership Team: Meet Some Of Our New Team Members — Stability AI" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: DeepMind and LinkedIn Co-Founders Unveil New Conversational AI Startup Inflection AI - Voicebot.ai
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: DeepMind co-founder Mustafa Suleyman and LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman are partnering to launch conversational AI startup Inflection AI. The new company hasn’t revealed many details but stated it will focus on boosting human-machine communication. Selection reason: 权威科技媒体，明确报道Mustafa Suleyman联合创立Inflection AI，聚焦人机交互新范式，直接关联人物与作品。 Source preview: Primary Mobile Navigation Secondary Navigation Voicebot.ai # Primary Navigation Inflection AI DeepMind and LinkedIn Co-Founders Unveil New Conversational AI Startup Inflection AI DeepMind co-founder Mustafa Suleyman and LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman are partnering to launch conversational AI startup Inflection AI. The new company hasn’t revealed many details but stated it will focus on boosting human-machine communication. Inflection AI Inflection’s long-term goal is smoothing conversations between humans and computers to where any machine will understand and respond to natural language like voice assistants. That may take several years, however. Suleyman will serve as Inflection CEO, jo... MiMo rationale: 原来源仅为机构通用页面，未涉及人物具体信息。候选来源中，Voicebot.ai文章和Greylock官方资料页均直接、权威地证明了Mustafa Suleyman作为Inflection AI联合创始人兼CEO的角色，且Inflection AI专注于人机交互新范式，符合证据要求。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Mustafa Suleyman directly. | Source must support why "A New Paradigm in Human-Machine Interaction" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Microsoft, freed from reliance on OpenAI, joins the race for ‘superintelligence’—and AI chief Mustafa Suleyman wants to ensure it serves humanity | Fortune
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman... When Mustafa Suleyman joined Microsoft in March 2024 to lead the company’s new consumer AI unit... Selection reason: 权威媒体报道，明确将Suleyman定位为微软AI负责人，并详细阐述其推动“人类主义超级智能”的背景和动机，提供了可靠的第三方佐证。 Source preview: Trendingnow 1 2 3 1 2 3 Microsoft, freed from relying on OpenAI, joins the race for ‘superintelligence’—and AI chief Mustafa Suleyman wants to ensure it serves humanity Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman When Mustafa Suleyman joined Microsoft in March 2024 to lead the company’s new consumer AI unit—home to products like Copilot—there were clear limits to what he could do. Because of Microsoft’s landmark deal with OpenAI, the company was barred from pursuing its own AGI research. The agreement even capped how large a model Microsoft could train, restricting the company from building systems beyond a certain computing threshold. (This limit was measured in FLOPS, or the number of mathematical ... MiMo rationale: 原始来源（微软AI博客）未明确提及Suleyman本人，导致人物关联弱。候选来源中，Cloud Wars文章直接引用并阐述了Suleyman的观点，Fortune文章提供了权威的第三方报道，两者均能有效补强人物与作品/观点的关系，适合作为替换或补充来源。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Mustafa Suleyman directly. | Source must support why "Towards Humanist Superintelligence - Microsoft AI" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: Mustafa Suleyman - Greylock Partners
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Mustafa Suleyman is the co-founder and CEO of Inflection, and a venture partner at Greylock. Selection reason: 官方机构资料页，明确列出Mustafa Suleyman为Inflection AI联合创始人兼CEO，权威性高。 Source preview: Greylock Logo Reverse icon hamburger icon close Mustafa Suleyman Venture Partner Mustafa Suleyman is the co-founder and CEO of Inflection, and a venture partner at Greylock. He spends his time advising early-stage companies and investing where he is enthusiastic about a team and project. I think it’s probably the most important question of our time.” That is how Mustafa Suleyman, CEO of Microsoft AI, begins a comprehensive blog post titled “Towards Humanist Superintelligence.” In the blog, Suleyman details the formation of the MAI Superintelligence Team and its mission to deliver AI “in a way that is carefully calibrated, contextualized, within limits.” Human-First Approach Suleyman, a prominent figure in the AI field, has a well-publicized ... appliedRows.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai Is a Billionaire for the First Time
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has officially hit billionaire status, a rare achievement for a non-founding CEO. Selection reason: 知名商业媒体，明确报道皮查伊首次成为亿万富翁，直接支持其财富增长的叙述。 Source preview: You're viewing the US website. Looking for the Site edition? This Big Tech CEO Just Became a Billionaire for the First Time Google CEO Sundar Pichai has officially hit billionaire status, a rare achievement for a non-founding CEO. Copied to clipboard Key Takeaways Google CEO Sundar Pichai, 53, who has been at the helm of the tech giant for nearly a decade, is now officially a billionaire. According to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index, Pichai is now worth $1.1 billion, a rare achievement for a non-founding CEO. Pichai’s rise in net worth is due to the growth of Google’s parent company, Alphabet, which has added more than $1 trillion in market value and returned 120% to investors since the be... appliedRows.title: Attention is All you Need
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Attention is All you Need Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N Gomez, Łukasz Kaiser, Illia Polosukhin Selection reason: NeurIPS官方论文详情页，明确列出阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼为第一作者，直接证明其与Transformer论文的关系。 Source preview: Attention is All you Need Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N Gomez, Łukasz Kaiser, Illia Polosukhin Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30 (NIPS 2017) Bibtex Metadata Paper Reviews Abstract The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent orconvolutional neural networks in an encoder and decoder configuration. The best performing such models also connect the encoder and decoder through an attentionm echanisms. We propose a novel, simple network architecture based solely onan attention mechanism, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.Experiments on two machine translation tasks show these model... appliedRows.title: 雅各布・烏茲科雷特Jakob Uszkoreit - AINEXT
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Jakob Uszkoreit 是「Attention Is All You Need」論文的共同作者，曾在 Google Brain 工作超過 13 年，參與開發早期的 Google 翻譯。2021 年，受到 AlphaFold 和 mRNA 疫苗成功的啟發，他創立了 Inceptive——一家用 AI 設計 RNA 藥物的生物科技公司。 Selection reason: 人物资料页，详细列出其职业经历、教育背景及关键论文，可作为权威的个人简介来源。 Source preview: 3:34 PM 週三 6月10日 2026 AI 新商業情報觀察站 紐約 鳳凰城 舊金山 雅各布・烏茲科雷特 Jakob Uszkoreit Inceptive 雅各布・烏茲科雷特 Jakob Uszkoreit 雅各布・烏茲科雷特 Transformer 論文共同作者，Inceptive 創辦人 共同創辦人與執行長 @ Inceptive 德國 1983 年生 個人網站 科學家 創辦人 CEO 關於 雅各布・烏茲科雷特 Jakob Uszkoreit Jakob Uszkoreit 是「Attention Is All You Need」論文的共同作者，曾在 Google Brain 工作超過 13 年，參與開發早期的 Google 翻譯。2021 年，受到 AlphaFold 和 mRNA 疫苗成功的啟發，他創立了 Inceptive——一家用 AI 設計 RNA 藥物的生物科技公司。他是「Transformer 八人幫」中唯一將 AI 應用於生物技術的創業者。 職涯經歷 2021-現在 共同創辦人與執行長 Inceptive 2008-2021 研究科學家 Google Brain 學歷 柏林工業大學 電腦科學與數學碩士 2007 創業經歷 Inceptive 2021 年創立 AI 生物科技公司，總部在柏林和矽谷 重要論文 Attention Is All You Need NeurIPS 2017 An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale ICLR 2020 ... MiMo rationale: 原始来源（X推文）缺乏具体内容，无法验证。候选中，Apple Podcasts和AINEXT资料页均明确提及人物身份、Transformer论文贡献及当前职位，可有效补强人物背景信息，替代或补充原始来源。 Evidence requirements: Source must name 雅各布·乌什科雷特 directly. | Source must support why "//x.com/kyosu/status/1409163620550860800" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: The AI Pioneer Developing New Kinds of Medicine - Apple Podcasts
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Jakob Uszkoreit is the CEO and co-founder of Inceptive, a biotech start-up. He’s also a co-author of “Attention is All You Need,” the paper that created transformer models. Selection reason: 权威媒体播客，明确提及雅各布·乌什科雷特（Jakob Uszkoreit）是Transformer论文共同作者及Inceptive CEO，可作为人物背景的补充来源。 Source preview: What's Your Problem? The AI Pioneer Developing New Kinds of Medicine Jakob Uszkoreit is the CEO and co-founder of Inceptive, a biotech start-up. He’s also a co-author of “Attention is All You Need,” the paper that created transformer models. Today, transformers power chatbots like ChatGPT and Claude. They’ve also led to breakthroughs in everything from generating images to predicting the structure of proteins. On today’s show, Jakob talks about the invention of transformer models. And he discusses how he’s using those models to try to invent new kinds of medicine, with a particular focus on RNA. See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information. Hosts & Guests Jacob Goldstein Jacob Goldst...
